prompt_text:
### Demographics: 55-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 74.8 kg; Height 160.1 cm; BMI 29.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 143/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.6%; 9 months ago 6.8%; 6 months ago 6.7%; 3 months ago 6.2%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 128mg/dL; 9 months ago 165mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 156mg/dL; current 163mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 76.9kg; 9 months ago 75.9kg; 6 months ago 74.9kg; 3 months ago 74.1kg; current 74.8kg), Height (12 months ago 160.1cm; 9 months ago 160.1cm; 6 months ago 160.1cm; 3 months ago 160.1cm; current 160.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 29.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 141mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 143mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 64U/L; 9 months ago 54U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 54U/L; current 59U/L), AST (12 months ago 83U/L; 9 months ago 84U/L; 6 months ago 75U/L; 3 months ago 68U/L; current 85U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 356mg/g; 9 months ago 345mg/g; 6 months ago 317mg/g; 3 months ago 213mg/g; current 265mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 139mg/dL; current 130mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.3g/dL; 9 months ago 12.3g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.3g/dL; current 11.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
